general.name: mos_target_allstar_dr17_synspec_rev1_parquet
general.description: The APOGEE All-Star DR17 synspec catalogue.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_allstar_dr17_synspec_rev1.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

aspcap_id.name: aspcap_id
aspcap_id.description: Unique apStar identifier: apogee.[ns].[sc].APSTAR_VERS.LOC.STAR, where [ns] is for APOGEE North/South, [sc] is for survey/commissioning

telescope.name: telescope
telescope.description: String representation of of telescope used for observation (apo25m, lco25m, apo1m)

src_h.name: src_h
src_h.description: Source of H-Band photometry for targeting

targ_4_5.name: targ_4_5
targ_4_5.description: 4.5 micron mag adopted for dereddening for targeting

targ_4_5_err.name: targ_4_5_err
targ_4_5_err.description: 4.5 micron mag adopted for dereddening for targeting, error

wash_ddo51_giant_flag.name: wash_ddo51_giant_flag
wash_ddo51_giant_flag.description: Flagged as a giant for targeting purposes based on Washington/DDO 51 photometry

wash_ddo51_star_flag.name: wash_ddo51_star_flag
wash_ddo51_star_flag.description: Flagged as a starfor targeting purposes based on Washington/DDO 51 photometry

targ_pmra.name: targ_pmra
targ_pmra.description: RA proper motion used for targeting

targ_pmdec.name: targ_pmdec
targ_pmdec.description: DEC proper motion used for targeting

targ_pm_src.name: targ_pm_src
targ_pm_src.description: Source of proper motion used for targeting

ak_targ_method.name: ak_targ_method
ak_targ_method.description: Method used to get targetting extinction

apogee_target1.name: apogee_target1
apogee_target1.description: Bitwise OR of first APOGEE-1 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions.

apogee_target2.name: apogee_target2
apogee_target2.description: Bitwise OR of second APOGEE-1 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions

apogee2_target1.name: apogee2_target1
apogee2_target1.description: Bitwise OR of first APOGEE-2 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions.

apogee2_target2.name: apogee2_target2
apogee2_target2.description: Bitwise OR of second APOGEE-2 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions

apogee2_target3.name: apogee2_target3
apogee2_target3.description: Bitwise OR of third APOGEE-2 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions

apogee2_target4.name: apogee2_target4
apogee2_target4.description: Bitwise OR of fourth APOGEE-2 target flag of all visits, see bitmask definitions

targflags.name: targflags
targflags.description: Verbose/text form of APOGEE-1 target flags

survey.name: survey
survey.description: Survey-associated with object: apogee, apo1m, apogee-marvels, apogee2, apogee2-manga, manga-apogee2

programname.name: programname
programname.description: Program name associated with object, when available

nvisits.name: nvisits
nvisits.description: Number of visits into combined spectrum

starflag.name: starflag
starflag.description: Flag for star condition taken from bitwise OR of individual visits, see bitmask definitions

andflag.name: andflag
andflag.description: Flag for star condition taken from bitwise AND of individual visits, see bitmask definitions

vhelio_avg.name: vhelio_avg
vhelio_avg.description: Average solar system barycentric radial velocity, weighted by S/N, using RVs determined from cross-correlation of individual spectra with combined spectrum

vscatter.name: vscatter
vscatter.description: Scatter of individual visit RVs around average

verr.name: verr
verr.description: Uncertainty in VHELIO_AVG from the S/N-weighted individual RVs

rv_teff.name: rv_teff
rv_teff.description: Teff of best-fit synthetic spectrum from RV fit (NOT ASPCAP!)

rv_logg.name: rv_logg
rv_logg.description: log g of best-fit synthetic spectrum from RV fit (NOT ASPCAP!)

rv_feh.name: rv_feh
rv_feh.description: [Fe/H] of best-fit synthetic spectrum from RV fit (NOT ASPCAP!)

rv_alpha.name: rv_alpha
rv_alpha.description: [alpha/M] of best-fit synthetic spectrum from RV fit (NOT ASPCAP!)

rv_carb.name: rv_carb
rv_carb.description: [C/M] of best-fit synthetic spectrum from RV fit (NOT ASPCAP!)

rv_ccfwhm.name: rv_ccfwhm
rv_ccfwhm.description: FWHM of cross-correlation peak from combined vs best-match synthetic spectrum

rv_autofwhm.name: rv_autofwhm
rv_autofwhm.description: FWHM of auto-correlation of best-match synthetic spectrum

n_components.name: n_components
n_components.description: Number of components identified from RV cross-correlations

meanfib.name: meanfib
meanfib.description: Mean fiber number of the set of observations

min_h.name: min_h
min_h.description: Bright H limit for target selection for this object

max_h.name: max_h
max_h.description: Faint H limit for target selection for this object

min_jk.name: min_jk
min_jk.description: Blue (J-K) limit for target selection for this object

max_jk.name: max_jk
max_jk.description: Red (J-K) limit for target selection for this object

gaiaedr3_source_id.name: gaiaedr3_source_id
gaiaedr3_source_id.description: GAIA source ID from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_pmra.name: gaiaedr3_pmra
gaiaedr3_pmra.description: GAIA proper motion in RA from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_pmra_error.name: gaiaedr3_pmra_error
gaiaedr3_pmra_error.description: GAIA uncertainty in proper motion in RA from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_pmdec.name: gaiaedr3_pmdec
gaiaedr3_pmdec.description: GAIA proper motion in DEC from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_pmdec_error.name: gaiaedr3_pmdec_error
gaiaedr3_pmdec_error.description: GAIA uncdertainty in proper motion in DEC from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_phot_g_mean_mag.name: gaiaedr3_phot_g_mean_mag
gaiaedr3_phot_g_mean_mag.description: GAIA g mag from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_phot_bp_mean_mag.name: gaiaedr3_phot_bp_mean_mag
gaiaedr3_phot_bp_mean_mag.description: GAIA Bp mag from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_phot_rp_mean_mag.name: gaiaedr3_phot_rp_mean_mag
gaiaedr3_phot_rp_mean_mag.description: GAIA Rp mag from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity.name: gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity
gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity.description: GAIA radial velocity from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity_error.name: gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity_error
gaiaedr3_dr2_radial_velocity_error.description: GAIA uncertainty in radial velocity from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_med_geo.name: gaiaedr3_r_med_geo
gaiaedr3_r_med_geo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones GEO distance estimate r_est from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_lo_geo.name: gaiaedr3_r_lo_geo
gaiaedr3_r_lo_geo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones 16th GEO percentile distance r_lo from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_hi_geo.name: gaiaedr3_r_hi_geo
gaiaedr3_r_hi_geo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones 84th GEO percentile distance r_hi from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_med_photogeo.name: gaiaedr3_r_med_photogeo
gaiaedr3_r_med_photogeo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones PHOTOGEO distance estimate r_est from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_lo_photogeo.name: gaiaedr3_r_lo_photogeo
gaiaedr3_r_lo_photogeo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones 16th percentile PHOTOGEO distance r_lo from GAIA EDR3

gaiaedr3_r_hi_photogeo.name: gaiaedr3_r_hi_photogeo
gaiaedr3_r_hi_photogeo.description: GAIA Bailer-Jones 84th percentile PHOTOGEO distance r_hi from GAIA EDR3

fparam_grid.name: fparam_grid
fparam_grid.description: Raw FERRE parameters for each grid for which fit was performed (see GRIDS tag in HDU3 for grid names

chi2_grid.name: chi2_grid
chi2_grid.description: CHI2 for each grid for which fit was performed (see GRIDS tag in HDU3 for grid names

fparam.name: fparam
fparam.description: Output parameter array from ASPCAP stellar parameters fit, in order given in PARAM_SYMBOL array in HDU3: Teff, logg, vmicro, [M/H], [C/M], [N/M], [alpha/M], vsini/vmacro

fparam_cov.name: fparam_cov
fparam_cov.description: Covariance of fitted parameters from FERRE

param.name: param
param.description: Empirically calibrated parameter array, using ASPCAP stellar parameters fit + calibrations, in order given in PARAM_SYMBOL array in HDU3: Teff, logg, vmicro, [M/H], [C/M], [N/M], [alpha/M], vsini/vmacro

param_cov.name: param_cov
param_cov.description: Covariance of calibrated parameters, but with only diagonal elements from "external" uncertainty estimation

paramflag.name: paramflag
paramflag.description: Individual parameter flag for ASPCAP analysis, see bitmask definitions

aspcapflag.name: aspcapflag
aspcapflag.description: Flag for ASPCAP analysis, see bitmask definitions

frac_badpix.name: frac_badpix
frac_badpix.description: Fraction of bad pixels in spectrum

frac_lowsnr.name: frac_lowsnr
frac_lowsnr.description: Fraction of low S/N pixels in spectrum

frac_sigsky.name: frac_sigsky
frac_sigsky.description: Fraction of SIG_SKYLINE pixels in spectrum

felem.name: felem
felem.description: Output individual element array from ASPCAP stellar abundances fit, in order given in ELEM_SYMBOL array in HDU3

felem_err.name: felem_err
felem_err.description: Uncertainty from FERRE in individual element abundances

x_h.name: x_h
x_h.description: Empirically calibrated individual element array, using ASPCAP stellar abundances fit + calibrations, all expressed in logarithmic abundance relative to H ([X/H]), in order given in ELEM_SYMBOL array in HDU3

x_h_err.name: x_h_err
x_h_err.description: Empirical uncertainties in [X/H], derived from repeat observations of stars

x_m.name: x_m
x_m.description: Empirically calibrated individual element array, using ASPCAP stellar abundances fit + calibrations, all expressed in logarithmic abundance relative to M ([X/M]) in order given in ELEM_SYMBOL array in HDU3

x_m_err.name: x_m_err
x_m_err.description: Empirical uncertainties in [X/M], derived from repeat observations of stars

elem_chi2.name: elem_chi2
elem_chi2.description: Chi^2 from ASPCAP fit of individual abundances

elemflag.name: elemflag
elemflag.description: Flags for analysis of individual abundances, see bitmask definitions

extratarg.name: extratarg
extratarg.description: Bitmask which identifies main survey targets and other classes, see bitmask definitions.

teff.name: teff
teff.description: Teff from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from PARAM)

logg.name: logg
logg.description: log g from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from PARAM)

m_h.name: m_h
m_h.description: [Z/H] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from PARAM)

alpha_m.name: alpha_m
alpha_m.description: [alpha/M] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from PARAM)

vmicro.name: vmicro
vmicro.description: microturbulent velocity (fit for dwarfs, f(log g) for giants)

teff_spec.name: teff_spec
teff_spec.description: ASPCAP spectroscopic Teff (duplicated from FPARAM[0] for convenience)

logg_spec.name: logg_spec
logg_spec.description: ASPCAP spectroscopic surface gravity (duplicated from FPARAM[1] for convenience)

v_fe.name: v_fe
v_fe.description: c_fe - [C/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

v_fe_err.name: v_fe_err
v_fe_err.description: [V/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

cr_fe.name: cr_fe
cr_fe.description: [Cr/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

cr_fe_err.name: cr_fe_err
cr_fe_err.description: [Cr/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

mn_fe.name: mn_fe
mn_fe.description: [Mn/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

mn_fe_err.name: mn_fe_err
mn_fe_err.description: [Mn/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

fe_h.name: fe_h
fe_h.description: [Fe/H] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

fe_h_err.name: fe_h_err
fe_h_err.description: [Fe/H] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

co_fe.name: co_fe
co_fe.description: [Co/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

co_fe_err.name: co_fe_err
co_fe_err.description: [Co/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

ni_fe.name: ni_fe
ni_fe.description: [Ni/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

ni_fe_err.name: ni_fe_err
ni_fe_err.description: [Ni/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

cu_fe.name: cu_fe
cu_fe.description: [Cu/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

cu_fe_err.name: cu_fe_err
cu_fe_err.description: [Cu/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

ce_fe.name: ce_fe
ce_fe.description: [Ce/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

ce_fe_err.name: ce_fe_err
ce_fe_err.description: [Ce/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

yb_fe.name: yb_fe
yb_fe.description: [Yb/Fe] from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

yb_fe_err.name: yb_fe_err
yb_fe_err.description: [Yb/Fe] uncertainty from ASPCAP analysis of combined spectrum (from X_M)

visit_pk.name: visit_pk
visit_pk.description: Index of visits (used in combined spectrum) in allVisit file
